ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "in_service_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was put into service */,
  "out_service_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was taken out of service */,
  "failure_date" TEXT /* Date when equipment failure occurred */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the equipment is located */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date for the equipment */,
  "total_operational_hours" REAL /* Total operational hours of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_equipments" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment relationship */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary equipment */,
  "related_equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related equipment */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., connected, dependent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipments_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipments_related_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for site inquiries */,
  "site_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., scheduled, unscheduled) */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the maintenance */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who supplied parts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, manager) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site managed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment ordered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who supplied the parts */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that failed */,
  "failure_date" TEXT /* Date when the failure occurred */,
  "failure_description" TEXT /* Description of the failure */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or action taken to resolve the failure */,
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance record related to the failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failures_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failures_maintenance_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_id") REFERENCES maintenance_records ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downtime" (
  "downtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each downtime record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that experienced downtime */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the downtime */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the downtime */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the downtime */,
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the failure record related to the downtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("downtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downtime_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downtime_failure_id FOREIGN KEY ("failure_id") REFERENCES failures ("failure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory storage */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., operator, engineer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that this permission is associated with */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES users_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment related to the report */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics related to the equipment performance */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was changed */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the equipment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the vendor */,
  "vendor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)
